case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ALFRED WRIGHTEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHTEN, ALFRED
